posts.text: American farmers have been hit hard by the trade war and the Iran conflict—but is it enough to put them off supporting Donald Trump? posts.text:
BREAKING: Spirit Airlines is now expected to cease operations at 3 AM ET on Saturday, per WSJ.

In ~11 hours from now, Spirit Airlines may indefinitely shut down amid bankruptcy.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
Happy May Day to all my lazy friends here in America. One day someone will do real Communism correctly…🤣
